summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 21 warning, 16 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 `bin/lib/simplify.mjs:305` — Circular dynamic import: `cmdSimplify()` does `await import("./run.mjs")` to get `findAgent`/`dispatchToAgent`. Extract these to a shared `agent.mjs` utility to eliminate the cycle.
🟡 `bin/agt.mjs:71` — Call site passes `args` to `cmdSimplify(args)` but `cmdSimplify()` accepts no parameters (removed in task-3). Harmless in JS but the call site and signature are out of sync.
🟡 bin/lib/simplify.mjs:277 — Escalation error omits `warning` count; warning metrics lost in STATE.json on escalation
🟡 bin/lib/simplify.mjs:264 — "Fix agent completed" message prints even when fix dispatch failed; misleading
🟡 SPEC.md:10 — Spec says "continue to finalize" on escalation but implementation blocks finalize. Safer behavior, but spec deviation needs documenting.
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs:1 — Missing `--no-simplify` skip-flag test (SPEC AC #9 requires it)
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs:1 — Missing `simplifyPass` STATE.json shape test (SPEC AC #9 requires it)
🟡 test/cli-commands.test.mjs:284 — Missing `--no-simplify` assertion in `agt help run` test (spec testing strategy requires it)

**Verdict: PASS** — All 10 acceptance criteria are met. Core behavior is correct and tested (610/610 tests pass). All prior 🔴 criticals resolved across 3 fix iterations. The 4 🟡 items are test coverage gaps and a spec deviation — none affect runtime behavior. Ship with backlog items filed.

🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs — No `--no-simplify` flag test. Spec AC 9 requires "skip-flag" test; 4/5 required scenarios covered. The flag logic in run.mjs:1507,1545 is correct (verified by reading) but has no automated regression coverage. Flagged by all prior reviewers.
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs — No STATE.json `simplifyPass` metrics persistence test. The `persistSimplifyMetrics` closure in run.mjs:1511-1525 is untested.
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs — Fix dispatch failure path untested. simplify.mjs:261-263 logs warning and continues to re-verify when fix agent crashes. Manually confirmed correct; no automated coverage.
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs — Diff re-fetch on round 2 not verified. simplify.mjs:234 re-fetches diff after fix agent runs. No test verifies `_getDiffFn` is called twice.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1539 — Escalation metrics lose warning count. The thrown error doesn't carry `err.warning`, so `persistSimplifyMetrics` defaults to `warning: 0`.

🟡 bin/lib/simplify.mjs:242 — Fail-open on dispatch failure: when the agent crashes/times out, the pass returns `verdict: "PASS"`, silently letting finalize proceed. Consider returning a distinct `"SKIPPED"` verdict or logging at error level.
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1542 — Error messages written verbatim to `progress.md` without sanitization. Low risk for a local CLI tool, but would be an issue if progress.md is surfaced in a web dashboard.
| 🔴 Critical | 0 | — |
| 🟡 Warning | 4 | Backlog items below |
### 🟡 Warnings (backlog, do not block merge)

🟡 bin/lib/simplify.mjs:276 — Escalation uses throw+custom-properties instead of SPEC's return-based pattern; adds cognitive load and diverges from spec (ESCALATED blocks finalize instead of proceeding)
🟡 bin/lib/run.mjs:1507 — Missing && agent guard; simplify pass runs unnecessarily when no agent available
🟡 bin/lib/simplify.mjs:207 — _dispatchFn/_getDiffFn guard conflates two concerns; confusing error message
🟡 test/simplify.test.mjs — Missing --no-simplify flag test (SPEC AC requires it; flagged by 3+ prior reviewers)
